_note: Representative tool surface of a common stock Gmail MCP server (e.g. GongRzhe/Gmail-MCP-Server). Used only for the FIXED schema-tax line of the benchmark. Schemas are faithful approximations of the documented surface; swap in a live server's tools/list for exact numbers via --gmail-tools. Not affiliated.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Sends a new email message. Supports plain text and HTML bodies, multiple to/cc/bcc recipients, file attachments, and threading via inReplyTo/references for replies.

tools.name: draft_email
tools.description: Creates a draft email message in the user's mailbox without sending it. Same fields as send_email.

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Retrieves the full content of a specific email message by its id, including subject, sender, recipients, date, body (plain and HTML), and a list of attachment metadata.

messageId.description: The id of the email message to retrieve

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Searches for emails using Gmail search syntax (e.g. 'from:foo@bar.com', 'subject:invoice', 'after:2024/01/01', 'has:attachment', 'is:unread'). Returns matching message ids and thread ids.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: modify_email
tools.description: Modifies the labels on an email message — add or remove label ids, archive (remove INBOX), mark read/unread, star, move to a folder/label.

tools.name: delete_email
tools.description: Permanently deletes an email message by id (bypasses Trash). This cannot be undone.

tools.name: list_email_labels
tools.description: Retrieves all labels in the user's mailbox — both system labels (INBOX, SENT, SPAM, TRASH, etc.) and user-created labels, with their ids, names, type, and message/thread counts.

tools.name: create_label
tools.description: Creates a new label in the user's mailbox with the given name and optional visibility settings for the label list and message list.

tools.name: update_label
tools.description: Updates an existing label's name or visibility settings, identified by label id.

tools.name: delete_label
tools.description: Deletes a user-created label by id. System labels cannot be deleted.

tools.name: get_or_create_label
tools.description: Gets an existing label by name, or creates it if it does not exist. Returns the label id.

tools.name: batch_modify_emails
tools.description: Modifies labels on multiple email messages in a single batch operation — add/remove label ids across many messages at once.

tools.name: batch_delete_emails
tools.description: Permanently deletes multiple email messages by id in a single batch operation. Cannot be undone.

tools.name: download_attachment
tools.description: Downloads an attachment from a specific email message to a local file path, identified by message id and attachment id.
